headline: Hubbell Incorporated Prices $1.9 Billion Senior Notes Offering
summary: Shelton, CT, June 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) (“Hubbell” or the “Company”) today announced that it has successfully priced an offering (the “offering”) of an aggregate principal amount of $1.9 billion of senior notes, consisting of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 4.650% senior notes due 2031, $700 million aggregate principal amount of 4.900% senior notes due 2033 and $700 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% senior notes due 2036 (collectivel
